description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI-Linux that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have a single ubuntu-latest job with a 120-minute timeout that checks out the repository, initializes submodules, installs linuxdeploy and dependencies, sets up Qt 5.12.10, builds and installs the project, packages it into an AppImage, and uploads the artifact. The workflow should also update the continuous build release and tag.
